## Description {#description}

Contains information about configured [roles](../../guides/sre/user-management/index.md#role-management).

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Role name.
- `id` ([UUID](/sql-reference/data-types/uuid)) — Role ID.
- `storage` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Path to the storage of roles. Configured in the `access_control_path` parameter.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## See Also {#see-also}

- [SHOW ROLES](/sql-reference/statements/show#show-roles)
